message:
test(conformance): add property-based tests for conformance output
comparison with fuzzed extension registration payloads

- Add proptest strategies for generating realistic conformance output:
  ident_strategy, semver_strategy, bounded_json (recursive, depth-limited),
  named_entry_strategy, shortcut_entry_strategy, model_entry_strategy,
  tool_def_entry_strategy, hostcall_entry_strategy
- Add conformance_output_strategy composing all sub-strategies into
  full extension registration output with randomized commands, shortcuts,
  flags, providers, tool_defs, models, event_hooks, and optional events

Property-based tests (128 cases each):
- proptest_compare_conformance_output_reflexive: comparison is reflexive
  on valid conformance shapes
- proptest_compare_conformance_output_symmetry: comparison is symmetric
  (expected↔actual yields same pass/fail)
- proptest_compare_deep_nesting_depth_200_no_panic: depth-200 nested
  objects don't cause stack overflow in comparison
- proptest_compare_large_required_arrays_order_insensitive: required
  arrays compared as sets (order doesn't matter)
- proptest_type_confusion_reports_diff: different JSON types always
  report a difference

Helpers:
- minimal_output_with_events, output_with_type_probe, deeply_nested_object
  for constructing targeted test fixtures
- primitive_value_strategy for type-confusion testing across null, bool,
  number, string, array, and object variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
